response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud-native architectures. Recent roles at Google (Staff SWE with AI-agent/MCP work) and Meta align directly with the stack and AI-agent requirement. Long-standing focus on testing, TDD, and craftsmanship matches the team's quality bar. Some gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin specifics, but the breadth and depth strongly suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes across senior roles
Recent AI-agent and MCP code-generator work at Google matches the AI agent requirement
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks, public talks/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Resume lists Google/Meta/Amazon as employers in ways that may need verification (Amazon listed as 'Founder' for an open-source project)
